headline: Earnings Preview: Smurfit Westrock (SW) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Smurfit Westrock (SW) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: What to Expect From Smurfit Westrock's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Smurfit Westrock is scheduled to release its fiscal first-quarter earnings this month, and analysts project a double-digit profit drop.
